summary: Code and contract review passed for the RAGFlow knowledge-driven template change, but final browser/provider acceptance is blocked by the real upstream provider returning saturation/502.

evidence.details: POST /api/v1/image-generations returned 502 IMAGE_PROVIDER_CALL_FAILED; direct upstream probe returned 429 saturation/retry-later

blocking_items: Real upstream provider returned HTTP 429 saturation in direct probe and Final API returned 502 IMAGE_PROVIDER_CALL_FAILED, so no images[].url or generated image GET no-store proof was available.
decision: Do not mark complete, commit, or push until provider-backed browser acceptance succeeds.
